metadata.title: John Moya Cantillana | Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Full Stack Developer specialized in Next.js, React and TypeScript. Builder of scalable web platforms with over 32,000 users.

hero.name: John Moya Cantillana
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I design, build, and deploy production-ready web applications with a strong focus on architecture, scalability, and product needs.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Full Stack Developer with experience building complex web platforms from scratch. My approach combines solid software architecture with practical product feature implementation.

fandoms.name: Fandoms.io
fandoms.description: Designed and built a complete social platform for fan communities, taking it from concept to production with thousands of active users.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.description: Fandoms.io is a complete social platform for fan communities, similar to Reddit with Discord-like features, developed from scratch as an individual project.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.description: Fan communities needed a Spanish-language platform that combined Reddit's community structure with Discord's real-time interaction, without the configuration complexity.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.description: A unified platform with community system, moderation, interactive content, real-time chat and gamification.

features.content: Content feed with posts, comments and voting

architecture.title: Technical Architecture
architecture.description: Modern stack optimized for performance and scalability.

auth.title: Robust PWA Authentication
auth.problem: OAuth authentication and session handling had complex edge cases in PWA environments.
auth.solution: Hybrid session persistence system with fallbacks, multi-session conflict detection and adaptive timeouts.

realtime.title: Scalable Real-time
realtime.problem: Maintaining efficient WebSocket connections without degrading performance.
realtime.solution: Reusable channel pattern with reference counting and real-time JWT updates.

feed.title: Performant Feed
feed.problem: Loading feeds with complex data without N+1 queries.
feed.solution: Cursor pagination, optimized queries with selective JOINs and TanStack Query cache.

roles.title: Granular Permission System
roles.problem: Different permissions based on context (admin, moderator, author).
roles.solution: Row Level Security with composite PostgreSQL policies and dual client-server verification.

learnings.title: Key Learnings
items: Initial architecture matters: refactoring tables with data is complex
RLS is powerful but requires careful planning
Aggressive caching improves UX but complicates invalidation
PWA authentication edge cases require exhaustive testing
Real-time metrics help make product decisions

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Interested in working together?
contact.description: I'm looking for opportunities where I can contribute solid technical solutions while continuing to learn from more experienced developers.
